ol.li: Stop the replicaset that to be restored$ /opt/sequoiadb/bin/sdb >db=new Sdb('192.168.20.35',50000) 192.168.20.35:50000 >rg=db.getRG('foo') foo >rg.stop()

Recover data files $ tar -zxvf vmsvr1-rhel-x64.51000.2013_08_21.tar.gz /tmpfs/data1/foo.dat /tmpfs/data1/one.dat /tmpfs/data1/SYSTEMP.dat /tmpfs/data1/foo.idx /tmpfs/data1/one. idx /tmpfs/data1/SYSTEMP.idx
Delete log files.The log files are saved in the "logpath" directory in the configuration file,<SequoiaDB installed path >/replicalog by default. $ rm -rf /tmpfs/data1/replicalog

body.note: It will result in data inconsistency among data nodes within replicaset if only recover one node.
